next_steps: Perform immunohistochemical staining on biopsy samples for CD1a, CD68, CD163, and S100 to evaluate for histiocytic disorders.
Molecular testing for BRAF V600E mutation and other MAPK pathway mutations.
Order serum vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF) level to screen for POEMS syndrome.
Perform a thorough neurological examination and nerve conduction studies to evaluate for polyneuropathy.
Request pathology re-review specifically focusing on histiocyte morphology and emperipolesis.
Comprehensive assessment for endocrinopathies and dermatologic manifestations associated with POEMS syndrome.
